diff: If market conditions or other factors create an immediate and severe risk of capital impairment, Spark is empowered to implement immediate changes to risk parameters and configuration to mitigate risk. Actions taken may include preventing new loans or draws on existing loans, adjusting configurable parameters, or requesting accelerated repayment and return of capital.
